name: Roman Licursi
headline: RevOps & GTM Analytics | Building data systems for B2B SaaS growth | Computer Science @ UW–Madison
about:
I help revenue teams make better decisions faster using data and automation. Most GTM teams struggle because their data is inconsistent and their forecasts are unreliable. I fix that by designing clean, automated frameworks that leaders can trust.

Recent work:
- Churn prediction dashboard: Flagged 22.8% of at-risk accounts, projecting 15% churn reduction and $131K saveable MRR
- Lead scoring automation: 12% improvement in MQL→SQL conversion by prioritizing high-value leads
- Marketing ROI tracker: Improved ROAS from 2.8 → 3.3 by identifying and cutting low-performing spend

SQL, Python (APIs, automation, machine learning), Tableau, Salesforce, HubSpot, Clay for GTM data activation, and workflow automation with Zapier and Make. I pair this with a working knowledge of SaaS unit economics like CAC, LTV, churn, and payback so every system I build ties to real revenue outcomes.

Currently: CS junior at UW Madison focused on roles where I can architect data driven revenue systems at scale.

Portfolio: https://github.com/romanlicursi | Email: romanlicursi@gmail.com

projects.title: E-Commerce Data Quality Pipeline
projects.description:
Built an end-to-end ETL pipeline processing 50,000 e-commerce orders, identifying and resolving 7,984 data quality issues to deliver analytics-ready tables for business intelligence. Designed with cloud-native architecture for AWS production deployment.

**Technical Implementation:**
- Engineered multi-stage pipeline: ingestion → validation → cleaning → transformation → monitoring → export with comprehensive logging and idempotent stages
- Developed automated data quality framework measuring completeness, validity, uniqueness, and consistency across all dimensions
- Built SQL transformations using CTEs and window functions creating five analytics tables: fct_orders (47,616 rows), dim_customers (11,887), product_performance, marketing_attribution (72 source-quarter combos), and daily_metric

projects.title: Lead Scoring Automation System
projects.description:
Built an end-to-end lead scoring automation system that replicates enterprise CRM functionality, demonstrating production-ready Revenue Operations capabilities. The project combines rule-based scoring logic with machine learning to prioritize high-value leads and automate sales team notifications.

**Technical Implementation:**
- Developed dual scoring methodology: rule-based algorithm (weighted behavioral + firmographic attributes) and ML-powered probability model using Logistic Regression with scikit-learn
- Built automated data pipeline processing lead attributes including engagement metrics (pages viewed, CTA clicks, email open rates), firmographic data (annual revenue, industry, company size), and behavioral signals (demo requests, lead source)
- Engineered feature preprocessing pipel

projects.title: NimbusHR | RevOps Dashboard, Funnel Analytics & Churn Model (SQL + Python + Tableau)
projects.description:
📊 Built a full-stack RevOps analytics dashboard and churn prediction engine for a fictional B2B SaaS company using SQL, Python (logistic regression), and Tableau.

🚀 Business Goals Simulated:

Funnel drop-off visibility (Lead → MQL → SQL → Customer)
CAC/payback period by marketing channel
Churn risk scoring to prioritize retention campaigns

🔍 Key Results:

Identified 15% of customers with ≥60% churn probability
AUC: 0.793 | Accuracy: 0.794
Highlighted inefficient spend (e.g. LinkedIn = high CAC, long payback)
